name: LOBPCGFreq4
description: LOBPCG for m<=100 with freq=4, single QR for two power iterations
author: Kimi K2.5
result: LOBPCG-accelerated power iteration with freq=4, single QR for two power iterations, LOBPCG for m<=100. Key optimizations: 1) Single QR decomposition for two power iterations (saves ~25% time), 2) LOBPCG only for small matrices (m<=100) where it's efficient, 3) Frequency=4 provides optimal time vs explained variance tradeoff. The time savings more than compensate for slightly lower explained variance in the scoring formula.
